examples: They're allowed no armor, only a loincloth.
He wears a pointy mask and an animal-skin loincloth.
The little chap in the loincloth taught me one huge lesson – to be the change I wanted to see in the world.
The pharmacist, who lived above the clinic, had come down wearing a loincloth and undershirt.
For another, Masato is only seven years old and doesn't know how to tie his own loincloth.
